name: Westerhope and Newburn

locations.address: Etal Lane Police Station Etal Lane Westerhope Newcastle NE5 4AW

description: Newcastle is world-renowned for its nightlife, culture, heritage and sporting venues. Its suburbs are largely residential and Newcastle is also one of the most diverse areas in our force. We have police bases in the city centre, the West End, Byker and Etal Lane, plus a team stationed within the international airport.
